name: Eteled
description:
I made this because I could only find ones of Austin :(
This is Eteled from Wii Deleted You, a creepypasta. Real sad.
(Wii Deleted You is a creepypasta story about a Mii named Eteled that is possessed by the spirit of a former Nintendo of America worker named Henry.)
Edit: How the heck does this have so many- huh?
creator: Sussybakalife
